claim_boundary: Client Phase 2 creates intake and data-room scaffolds only. It does not create legal advice, financial advice, binding contract terms, compliance certification, production monitoring, truth validation, or autonomous client action.

classification_rules.archive_caution: Preserved for provenance but not active use without review.
classification_rules.do_not_first_send: Do not include in first outreach or early scoping packets.
classification_rules.private: Internal/client-confidential workflow artifact. Not public by default.
classification_rules.protected: Sensitive or label-bearing artifact. No public promotion. Human/legal/security review may be required.
classification_rules.public: Approved for public use only after Claim Gauntlet, Promotion Gate, provenance, and human review.
classification_rules.public_candidate: May become public only after gate checks and human review.

guardrails: No protected method disclosure during intake.
Buyer retains labels and final adjudication.
Use CPA/legal support if procurement, contract terms, budget, paid pilot, or money movement becomes real.
purpose: Create client intake checklist, required artifacts, artifact classification rules, and a data-room index scaffold.

required_artifacts.description: Visible sequence of workflow events, states, actions, or outputs.
Claimed final ledger, workflow, task, payment, decision, or operational state.
Buyer-retained labels or adjudication outcomes, if available.
Written description of what is in and out of scope.
Pre-registered success criteria for any paid pilot or evaluation.
Known limitations, prohibited uses, and human-review requirements.
